home.name: How to Record Dual Orientation Video with Dimensions
home.description: Get started recording portrait and landscape video simultaneously with the Dimensions camera app.

steps.name: Frame Your Shot
steps.text: Open Dimensions and use the cross-shaped viewfinder to compose both your portrait and landscape crops before recording.

steps.name: Record Once
steps.text: Slide to record. Face following keeps you centered and auto-leveling keeps the horizon straight while you film.

steps.name: Get Both Videos
steps.text: Both portrait (9:16) and landscape (16:9) versions export to your Photos automatically when you stop recording.

steps.name: Post Everywhere
steps.text: Upload the portrait version to TikTok and Instagram Reels, and the landscape version to YouTube — all from a single take.

dualRecording.name: How to Record Both Portrait and Landscape Video at Once
dualRecording.description: Use Dimensions to capture 9:16 portrait and 16:9 landscape video simultaneously from a single recording session.

steps.name: Open Dimensions
steps.text: Launch the Dimensions camera app on your iPhone. The cross-shaped viewfinder displays both portrait and landscape crop regions.

steps.name: Compose Both Frames
steps.text: Position your subject so it looks good in both the portrait (center vertical) and landscape (center horizontal) previews shown in the viewfinder.

steps.name: Slide to Record
steps.text: Drag the record slider to start capturing. Dimensions records a square frame and simultaneously renders both 9:16 and 16:9 crops in real time.

steps.name: Export Both Videos
steps.text: Stop recording and both portrait and landscape video files are saved to your Photos library automatically — ready to upload to TikTok, YouTube, or Instagram.

livePreview.name: How to Preview Both Video Orientations Before Recording
livePreview.description: Use the Dimensions cross-shaped viewfinder to see exactly how both portrait and landscape crops will look in real time.

steps.name: Open the Viewfinder
steps.text: Launch Dimensions. The unique cross-shaped viewfinder overlay shows both your 9:16 portrait and 16:9 landscape crop regions simultaneously.

steps.name: Adjust Your Framing
steps.text: Move your camera, reposition your subject, or pinch to zoom. Both crop previews update instantly so you can compose the perfect shot for both orientations.

steps.name: Confirm Your Composition
steps.text: Check that your subject, text, and important details are visible in both the portrait and landscape regions before you start recording.

steps.name: Record with Confidence
steps.text: Slide to record knowing exactly what both output videos will look like. No surprises in post-production.

autoLeveling.name: How to Record Level Video Without a Gimbal
autoLeveling.description: Dimensions uses your iPhone's gyroscope to automatically keep the horizon level in every frame — no extra gear needed.

steps.name: Enable Auto Leveling
steps.text: Open Dimensions. Auto leveling is built in and active by default — no settings to configure.

steps.name: Hold Your Phone Naturally
steps.text: Film handheld, walk around, or vlog on the go. You do not need to keep your phone perfectly straight.

steps.name: Record Your Video
steps.text: Slide to record. The app reads your device's gyroscope and applies per-frame counter-rotation to keep the horizon locked and level throughout.

steps.name: Get Perfectly Straight Output
steps.text: Both portrait and landscape exports come out with a perfectly level horizon — no post-production correction needed.

faceFollowing.name: How to Stay Perfectly Framed with Face Following
faceFollowing.description: Dimensions tracks your face across three axes and automatically adjusts framing to keep you centered in both portrait and landscape video.

steps.name: Position Yourself
steps.text: Open Dimensions and point the camera at yourself. The app detects your face and begins tracking automatically.

steps.name: Move Freely
steps.text: Walk, gesture, lean, or change height. Face following tracks you across X (horizontal), Y (vertical), and Z (zoom) axes smoothly.

steps.name: Let Pose-Aware Framing Work
steps.text: Turn your head and Dimensions adds natural headroom in the direction you are looking — creating composed, cinematic framing automatically.

steps.name: Record Without a Camera Operator
steps.text: Slide to record. You stay perfectly centered in both portrait and landscape outputs no matter how much you move during the take.

webApp.description: Dimensions is a free iOS camera app that records both portrait and landscape video from a single take. Perfect for content creators who post to TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram.
features: Three-axis face following with pose-aware framing
